case_title: SHAKOORI, ALI R. DBA GOLDEN GATE SERVICE CENTER VS JILEK, STAR

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFT'S ATTY CONTESTING THE VALIDITY OF THE PROOF OF SERVICE.
DEFT'S REQUEST TO QUASH SERVICE OF PROCESS OF THE 4/15/99 ORDER TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION (CONTINUED TO 4/22/99) IS GRANTED. BASED ON THE PROOF OF
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $119.72 FILED BY SHAKOORI, ALI R. DBA GOLDEN GATE SERVICE CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT JILEK, STAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-26-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF APR-22-1999, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT JILEK, STAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAKOORI, ALI R. DBA GOLDEN GATE SERVICE CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JILEK, STAR $119.72 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $139.72 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

COPIES OF ORDER SENT TO PARTIES.
SERVICE FILED ON 3/10/99, THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFT WAS NOT PROPERLY SERVED. THE ORDER TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR.
